personal.name: Suraj Phalod
personal.headline: Product Supply Data Science Manager
personal.education: BITS Pilani Dual Degree (B.E. Computer Science & M.Sc. Economics & Finance)
personal.about: I build data science systems that drive real-world supply chain decisions at scale. By day, I lead ML initiatives at P&G across India and AMEA. Outside work, I'm building distraction-blocking hardware, scaling a heritage farm stay in Udaipur, and running long distances. I write about data architecture, business strategy, and lifestyle design.
